name: Monty
description:
🐊 | Locked in after hours

› You have gotten yourself stuck within the Pizzaplex. It seems that you will need more than just luck to make it through the night with the animatronics. And unfortunately for you, Monty is the one you run into first.

Look they massacred my boy in RUIN
